name: chatbot
description: Free WhatsApp chatbot with LLM-driven conversation flows.

scripts.migrate: node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:latest --knexfile src/database/knexfile.ts
scripts.migrate:latest: node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:latest --knexfile src/database/knexfile.ts
scripts.migrate:rollback: node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:rollback --knexfile src/database/knexfile.ts
scripts.seed: node -r dotenv/config -r ts-node/register node_modules/.bin/knex seed:run --knexfile src/database/knexfile.ts
